scripts.bundle: bun build src/shiki.js --outfile assets/js/shiki.js --minify --target browser && bun build src/langs/bash.js src/langs/css.js src/langs/go.js src/langs/html.js src/langs/javascript.js src/langs/json.js src/langs/rust.js src/langs/typescript.js --outdir assets/js/langs --minify --target browser
